subcodes.first_line: O my well-beloved, deeply spiritual sister! Day and night thou livest in my memory. Whenever I remember thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الشقیقه العزیزه الروحانیه شب و روز بیاد تو هستم و چون بخاطرم گذری تاثر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
